lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What was the tree like in Nebuchadnezzar’s dream?
answers: It reached the sky and gave food and shade to many

questions.text: What did the angel say about the tree?
answers: Cut it down but leave the stump
Cut it down and burn the stump

questions.text: What did the angel say would happen to Nebuchadnezzar?
answers: He would live like an animal for a time
He would turn into a tree
He would be able to talk to animals

questions.text: Who explained the dream to the king?
Why was God going to make the king live like an animal?
answers: To show that God rules over all

questions.text: What did Nebuchadnezzar do a year after the dream?
What happened right after he boasted?
answers: God made him think like an animal
God turned him into a lion

questions.text: What did Nebuchadnezzar look like after living like an animal?
answers: He had long hair and nails like claws
He grew the wings of a bird
All of his teeth fell out

questions.text: What happened when Nebuchadnezzar’s mind returned?
answers: He praised God and became king again
He thought it all had been a dream
He bragged about his kingdom again
